title: ananassa sativa var. viridis
intro: Ananassa sativa var. viridis, also known as the green form of the strawberry tree or green strawberry, is a variety of the strawberry tree that is native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been shown to have various health benefits, including reducing the risk of heart disease and certain types of cancer, as well as improving digestive health. Herbal preparations of Ananassa sativa var. viridis can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
